bid_claims.quote_text: On June 21, 2013, Party A submitted an unsolicited proposal to the Mac-Gray Board of Directors offering to purchase Mac-Gray for an all-cash purchase price of $17.00 to $19.00 per share

event_claims.description: The Board authorized Mac-Gray management to work with BofA Merrill Lynch to explore transactional opportunities available to Mac-Gray.
event_claims.quote_text: at an in-person meeting of the Board on April 5, 2013, the Board discussed the sale of CSC to Pamplona as well as industry-wide merger and acquisition activity and dynamics, and authorized Mac-Gray management to work with BofA Merrill Lynch to explore transactional opportunities that might be available to Mac-Gray

event_claims.description: BofA Merrill Lynch, as instructed by the Board, contacted Party A to discuss a possible business combination with Mac-Gray.
event_claims.quote_text: On April 8, 2013, representatives of BofA Merrill Lynch, as instructed by the Board, telephoned a representative of Party A to discuss generally a possible business combination between Party A and Mac-Gray.

event_claims.description: The Board approved engaging BofA Merrill Lynch as financial advisor for exploration of strategic alternatives, including a potential sale process.
event_claims.quote_text: Based on the recommendation of the Transaction Committee, the Board unanimously approved the engagement of BofA Merrill Lynch on the terms discussed at this meeting.
